description: A renewable energy developer is analyzing the financial benefit of accelerated tax depreciation for a 10 MW (10,000 kW) commercial solar project in Phoenix, Arizona. Using PySAM and the weather data at /home/ga/SAM_Weather_Data/phoenix_az_tmy.csv, model a Single Owner PV system with a total installed cost of $12,000,000, a 25-year analysis period, a 21% federal income tax rate, a 30% Investment Tax Credit (ITC), and an 8% nominal discount rate. Compare the After-Tax Net Present Value (NPV) under two depreciation scenarios: 100% MACRS 5-year depreciation and 100% Straight-Line 20-year depreciation. Save the modeling script to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/depreciation_model.py and export the results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/depreciation_results.json using the keys: system_size_kw, total_installed_cost, npv_macrs_usd, npv_straight_line_usd, and macrs_value_add_usd.
